content.query:
CREATE VIEW player_clubs AS

SELECT 
    player.player_id,
    player.name AS player_name,
    player.country_of_birth,
    player.country_of_citizenship,

    club.club_id,
    club.name AS club_name,
    club.domestic_competition_id,
    club.total_market_value,
    club.squad_size

FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/players.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
WITH (
    player_id INT,
    name VARCHAR(200) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_SC_UTF8,
    country_of_birth VARCHAR(100) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_SC_UTF8,
    country_of_citizenship VARCHAR(100) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_SC_UTF8,
    current_club_id INT
) AS player

INNER JOIN OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/clubs.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
WITH (
    club_id INT,
    name VARCHAR(200) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_SC_UTF8,
    domestic_competition_id VARCHAR(100) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_SC_UTF8,
    total_market_value FLOAT,
    squad_size INT
) AS club

ON player.current_club_id = club.club_id;

SELECT * 
FROM player_clubs;

SELECT 
* 
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
WHERE QUARTER = 'Q1' AND YEAR = 2023;

SELECT country,ROUND(sum(revenue_usd), 2) as Total_Revenue
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
GROUP BY country; 

--- creating view 
CREATE VIEW Apple_revenue  as 
SELECT country,ROUND(sum(revenue_usd), 2) as Total_Revenue
FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION ='2.0'
) AS [RESULT] 
GROUP BY country;

SELECT * from Apple_revenue;

---- creating TopN

CREATE VIEW AppleRevenueTopN AS

SELECT
    country,
    total_revenue,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER(
        ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
    ) AS row_num
FROM (
SELECT
        country,
        ROUND(SUM(revenue_usd), 2) AS total_revenue
    FROM OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/synapse-container/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS result

    GROUP BY country

) AS revenue_data;

SELECT * from AppleRevenueTopN;

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapse-container@sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.sales (
	[sale_id] nvarchar(4000),
	[sale_date] date,
	[year] bigint,
	[quarter] nvarchar(4000),
	[month] nvarchar(4000),
	[country] nvarchar(4000),
	[region] nvarchar(4000),
	[city] nvarchar(4000),
	[product_name] nvarchar(4000),
	[category] nvarchar(4000),
	[storage] nvarchar(4000),
	[color] nvarchar(4000),
	[unit_price_usd] float,
	[discount_pct] bigint,
	[units_sold] bigint,
	[discounted_price_usd] float,
	[revenue_usd] float,
	[currency] nvarchar(4000),
	[fx_rate_to_usd] float,
	[revenue_local_currency] float,
	[sales_channel] nvarchar(4000),
	[payment_method] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_segment] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_age_group] nvarchar(4000),
	[previous_device_os] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_rating] float,
	[return_status] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'apple_global_sales_dataset.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapse-container_sarmastorage_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.sales
GO

source: from pyspark.sql import functions as F

adls_path ='abfss://synapse-container@sarmastorage.dfs.core.windows.net/apple_global_sales_dataset.csv' 
sales_df = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", True)
    .option("inferSchema", True)
    .load(adls_path)
)
display(sales_df)
